name: Slide Insurance Holdings, Inc.
summary: Slide Insurance Holdings, Inc. is a technology-enabled coastal specialty insurer launched in 2021, focusing on single-family, condominium, and commercial residential property and casualty insurance in coastal Atlantic states. Operating through Slide Insurance Company and Slide Specialty Insurance Company, it underwrites policies via independent agents and a direct-to-consumer channel. The company leverages proprietary data analytics, aerial imagery, AI, and an $8.9 trillion TIV dataset for risk selection and underwriting, participating in Florida's Citizens depopulation program and targeting underserved coastal markets.

products.name: Single-Family Homeowners Insurance
products.description: Property and casualty insurance policies for single-family homes in coastal Atlantic states.

products.name: Condominium Insurance
products.description: Property and casualty insurance policies for condominium properties in coastal markets.

products.name: Commercial Residential Insurance
products.description: Insurance policies for commercial residential properties in coastal Atlantic states.

products.name: Direct-to-Consumer (DTC) Insurance Channel
products.description: Direct sales platform for insurance products without use of brokers, agents, or intermediaries.

products.name: Proprietary Underwriting Technology
products.description: Technology platform using $8.9 trillion TIV dataset, predictive analytics, and AI for real-time underwriting decisions.

partnerships.description: Policy management system used for replacement cost calculation, real-time loss history, policyholder forms, and reinsurance cost estimation.
Participation in Citizens depopulation program to acquire policy blocks in Florida.
